name: Fried Rice with Sausage, Shrimp and Crab Meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the rice: Bring 6 quarts of unsalted water to a boil in a large, heavy pot. Stirring constantly, slowly pour in the rice. Reduce heat to moderate and let it boil uncovered for about 15 minutes or until the grains are slightly tender but still firm. Drain the rice in a sieve, fluff with a fork, and transfer to a bowl. Set aside to cool to room temperature. Cover and refrigerate overnight or at least 12 hours.
2. Soak mushrooms in hot water (1-1/2 cups) for at least 30 minutes until soft. Remove and discard water. Rinse mushrooms and discard stems. Slice each cap into 1/2-inch strips.
3. Cut onion lengthwise into 1/4 inch strips.
4. Shell and devein shrimp, chopping into 1/4 inch bits.
5. Cut sausages into 1-1/8 inch slices and fry in a wok over moderate heat for about 2 minutes until delicately browned on both sides and edges are crisp. Drain on absorbent paper.
6. Heat 1/4 cup oil in the wok. Add onions and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until soft. Regulate heat to prevent browning.
7. Add mushrooms, then the chilled rice, stirring constantly with a fork until heated through. Stir in fish sauce.
8. Push rice to the edge of the wok, making a well in the center. Pour in remaining oil and add shrimp. Cook shrimp for about 2 minutes, turning as they become firm and pink.
9. Mix shrimp into the rice and continue stirring over moderate heat until cooked through, about 5 minutes. Add crab meat and sausages and cook an additional 2 minutes.
10. Break eggs one at a time, stirring well after each addition. Mix in scallions and taste for seasoning. Add salt or more fish sauce if needed. Serve the fried rice mounded on a heated platter or bowl.
